premise: My parents forged my signature on a $400,000 trust my grandmother left me, transferring it to my brother’s failing construction business while they told the family I’d blown it on drugs. I bought the debt from the bank for $12,000 a decade later, foreclosed on his house, and sold it at auction while he watched.

thumb.label: Thumbnail + metadata
thumb.detail: My Parents Stole My $400K Inheritance, Told Everyone I Did Drugs. So I Foreclose
